content.en:
"I've seen Senior Brother Ye!"

The Yanyan controller came to Tongyang Mountain and visited Ye Tian.

"Senior Brother Yanyan, welcome to my Tongyang Mountain. "

Ye Tian invited Yan Yan's controller into Tongyang Mountain and entertained him.

"Senior Brother Ye, I didn't expect that this has only been such a short period of time, Senior Brother has already reached the Four Realms level controller, and Senior Brother I am still a Seven Domains level controller!" Yan Yan said in shock.

"It's just luck. "

Ye Tian said lightly, he didn't say too much, he couldn't boast of his high talent.

Yan Yan's controller didn't ask for excitement either, and immediately said the purpose of his visit this time.

"Senior Brother Ye, I'm here to ask for help this time, but this matter is also good for Senior Brother. Yan Yan said.

"Oh, what is it?" Ye Tian asked curiously.

Yan Yan's controller said, "Senior Brother Ye, I found a ruin, but my strength is not good, so I can't go deeper. Moreover, we can only bring one more person in. "

"Could it be that there are other Eternal Masters?"

Ye Tian asked.

Yan Yan's controller nodded, "There is also a senior brother, who is also a registered disciple of the master, Senior Brother Ye should know, he is also an eternal master of the thirteenth realm, the half-tooth master. "

"The half-tooth master, it turned out to be him!"

Ye Tian was naturally familiar with the half-tooth master, and he was able to become the personal disciple of the Ten Elements Ancestor, thanks to the half-tooth master, otherwise he would not have such an opportunity.

However, the Half-Tooth Master never came to him for help.

Yan Yan's controller said again: "Senior Brother Ye, that ruin is very likely to be a secret cave blessed land for those who control above the sixth realm, but that eternal master should have fallen unexpectedly, we have obtained a key to enter his cave mansion, but we can only enter it, and we can't crack the magic circle in it, and there are many killing arrays and traps there." Before, we were trapped for a long time, and we finally escaped using a special treasure. This time, we are going to go again, but after entering with our strength, we still can't get income, and we are even likely to be trapped again. And our relationship with the other disciples of the Ten Elements Ancestor is average, so we can't ask for such a powerful helper. Moreover, we are also afraid that they will take away our chance, and Senior Brother Ye is a personal disciple of Shizun, so naturally he will not care about this opportunity. That's why we came to ask Senior Brother Ye to help. "

"Senior Brother Yan Yan, I said before, if you have something to ask me for help, I will naturally help if I can, and this time I agreed. "

Ye Tian said.

"Thank you, Senior Brother Ye!"

Yan Yan's controller said gratefully.

Soon after, the Half-Tooth Masters arrived.

"Senior Brother Half Tooth, long time no see!"

Ye Tian smiled.

"Senior Brother Ye!"

The half-tooth controller said with emotion.

Although a lot of time has passed, Ye Tian, the incomparably weak Endless Controller in his eyes at the beginning, was still mentioned by him, but now he has grown to the level of the Four Realms Controller, and he has to look up to the existence.

Once upon a time, he didn't expect Ye Tian to have such a demonic talent.

At the beginning, he didn't think that Ye Tian could become the personal disciple of the Ten Elements Ancestor, at most he thought that Ye Tian could become the registered disciple of the Ten Elements Ancestor like him, at least he had a backer, and there was hope that he would surpass him in the future and become a controller above the first realm.

But who knew that Ye Tian had really become a personal disciple of the Ten Elements Ancestor, and his growth speed was even more amazing, breaking his cognition.

With this kind of talent, there may be hope for becoming a Ten Realm-level controller in the future.

"Senior Brother Banya, Senior Brother Yanyan, let's go. "

Ye Tian said.

"Hmm!"

The half-tooth controller and the Yanyan controller nodded slightly.

Immediately, the two of them took Ye Tian to the thirty-first boundary river.

"Senior Brother Ye, that relic is not in the Origin Realm Sea, but in the Thirty-One Realm River. The half-tooth master explained.

Soon after, they came to the Thirty-One Boundary River.

This time, they sneaked in, hiding their aura from the other Eternal Masters.

After all, the location of that ruin is still top secret, and no one knows.

Even if they were known, they wouldn't be able to get in without a key, but they didn't want to reveal their location.

After a while, the three of them arrived.

"This is it!"

The half-tooth master pointed to an island road.

This is a very common island in the Boundary River, and there is a formation on this island with sparse buildings on it.

"This place has been occupied by me, and when other Eternal Masters come here, they will only think that this is the temporary residence of an Eternal Master, and they will not deliberately explore it. The half-tooth master said.

An Eternal Master will have many dwellings, such as some Eternal Masters, who have dwellings in the Cave Mansion in the thirty-three boundary rivers, and even many dwellings in the Origin Realm Sea.

As a result, it is not uncommon for an Eternal Master to occupy an island as a temporary residence, and no one will suspect anything.

And the Legendary Realm Lord, whose strength has not reached the peak of the Eternal Master, can't see this island at all.

Airplanes!!!

Ye Tian entered the island with the Half Tooth Controller and Yan Yan Controller, and at this time, Ye Tian carefully observed the void, he comprehended the changes of two million spatial paths, so no matter how subtle the changes here were, he would be able to perceive them.

Through the slightest change in the space here, he was able to quickly locate the location of the ruins.

"This location!"

Ye Tian tore through time and space with just one hand, revealing a dark hole in space, and a cave was hidden there.

"Senior Brother Ye is really powerful, he found the ruins just after he came!" Yan Yan praised the master.

"Stop bragging about me, let's go inside!"

Ye Tian urged.

"Yes!"

Yan Yan's controller took out the key and opened the magic circle of this ruin.

Airplanes!

The three of them were wrapped in the key and entered the cave.

"The magic circle here is not simple, it may not be the Cave Heaven Blessed Land of the Six Realms-level masters, it is very likely to be a secret cave mansion of the Seven Realms-level masters. Ye Tian speculated.

If it is really the secret cave of the Seven Realms-level masters, then there is a high probability that there are some good things here.

At this time, they were on the periphery of this Cave Heaven Blessed Land, and there were many traces of destruction here, obviously done by the Yan Yan Masters and the Half Tooth Masters, and the outer places were all patronized by them, so there were no good things.

Soon, they came to a circle outside of the circle, which was the way to go.

"Senior Brother Ye, we entered this magic circle in the first place, and we were trapped by the magic circle for hundreds of billions of realm river years!"

Said the half-tooth master.

After such a long time, it was even rumored that he had fallen.

Yan Yan's controller added: "Senior Brother Ye, although we are trapped, this magic circle is protecting a good place, otherwise we would have escaped with the secret treasure a long time ago, and we would not be willing to be trapped for so long." "
